medications.name: GHK-Cu Peptide Treatment
medications.description: GHK-Cu Peptide is a powerful tripeptide bonded with copper ions, known for its ability to stimulate collagen production, support tissue repair, and combat signs of aging. Backed by decades of scientific research, GHK-Cu is safe for all skin types and a key component in anti-aging and regenerative treatments.
medications.indication: Clinically researched, it improves skin elasticity, reduces wrinkles, balances pigmentation, and promotes hair follicle repair for thicker, healthier hair. Additionally, it accelerates wound healing, reduces inflammation, and strengthens antioxidant defenses, making it ideal for post-procedure recovery and calming irritated skin.

medications.name: NAD+
medications.description: NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) is a vital coenzyme found in every cell of the body that plays a central role in energy production, cellular repair, and mitochondrial function. It is essential for converting nutrients into ATP (cellular energy) and supports critical processes like DNA repair, oxidative stress regulation, and aging-related resilience. NAD+ levels naturally decline with age, stress, illness, and environmental exposure, which may contribute to fatigue, cognitive decline, metabolic issues, and neurodegeneration.
medications.indication: Supports cellular energy production, mitochondrial function, and healthy aging. It may be used to assist in the management of fatigue, cognitive decline, neurodegenerative conditions, detoxification, and metabolic dysfunction, particularly in individuals experiencing stress-related depletion, chronic illness, or age-related decline in NAD+ levels.

medications.name: Selank
medications.description: A synthetic peptide developed as an analog of the naturally occurring immunomodulatory peptide tuftsin. Selank exhibits pronounced anxiolytic (anti-anxiety) effects without the sedative and dependency side effects commonly associated with traditional tranquilizers. Additionally, it has demonstrated nootropic properties, enhancing cognitive functions such as memory and learning.
medications.indication: Selank is used to support anxiety relief, cognitive enhancement, and stress management. This synthetic peptide promotes a calming effect without sedation, improves memory and focus, and helps regulate the body's stress response for overall mental well-being.

medications.name: SS-31 (Elamipretide)
medications.description: SS-31 (Elamipretide) is a cutting-edge mitochondrial peptide with wide-ranging benefits in cellular energy, aging, inflammation, and neuroprotection. By targeting and stabilizing mitochondrial membranes, it holds unique promise for individuals dealing with chronic fatigue, inflammation, autoimmune conditions, or degenerative diseases.
medications.indication: Indicated for any condition driven by mitochondrial dysfunction, especially where oxidative stress, energy failure, or age-related decline are involved. While still investigational, it is gaining popularity in integrative medicine, anti-aging, neurodegenerative care, and fatigue recovery protocols due to its direct mitochondrial repair mechanism.

medications.name: TB-400 / TB-500
medications.description: TB-400/500 is a synthetic fragment of thymosin beta-4 (specifically the 17-23 segment), designed to replicate its active region. Both are involved in actin regulation and tissue repair. TB-500 Therapy provides advanced treatment designed to enhance recovery, promote healing, and support overall physical performance.
medications.indication: TB-400/500 therapy helps reduce inflammation, accelerate tissue repair, and improve endurance, making it an ideal choice for those seeking optimal recovery and resilience.

medications.name: LR3 IGF-1
medications.description: LR3 IGF-1 (Long R3 Insulin-like Growth Factor 1) is a synthetic analog of IGF-1 with a modified amino acid sequence that significantly increases its stability and bioavailability. Unlike native IGF-1, LR3 IGF-1 resists binding to IGF-binding proteins, allowing for a prolonged half-life and more potent biological activity. It activates IGF-1 receptors to stimulate muscle growth, tissue repair, and cellular regeneration, while also enhancing nutrient uptake and improving insulin sensitivity. Due to its powerful anabolic properties, LR3 IGF-1 is commonly researched in the contexts of performance enhancement, anti-aging, and recovery optimization.
medications.indication: Promotes muscle hypertrophy, accelerates recovery, and supports tissue regeneration by activating IGF-1 receptors and increasing protein synthesis. Its resistance to IGF-binding proteins makes it ideal for protocols involving muscle growth, injury recovery, metabolic enhancement, and cellular repair.

medications.description: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN) is a compounded formulation of naltrexone, an opioid receptor antagonist, typically dosed between 0.5 mg and 4.5 mg. medications.name: NAD+
medications.description: NAD+ (Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide) is a vital coenzyme found in every cell of the body that plays a central role in energy production, cellular repair, and mitochondrial function. It is essential for converting nutrients into ATP (cellular energy) and supports critical processes like DNA repair, oxidative stress regulation, and aging-related resilience. NAD+ levels naturally decline with age, stress, illness, and environmental exposure, which may contribute to fatigue, cognitive decline, metabolic issues, and neurodegeneration.

It may be used to assist in the management of fatigue, cognitive decline, neurodegenerative conditions, detoxification, and metabolic dysfunction, particularly in individuals experiencing stress-related depletion, chronic illness, or age-related decline in NAD+ levels.

medications.name: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN)
medications.description: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN) is a compounded formulation of naltrexone, an opioid receptor antagonist, typically dosed between 0.5 mg and 4.5 mg. Unlike standard naltrexone dosing used for addiction treatment, LDN works by transiently blocking opioid receptors, leading to a rebound increase in endogenous endorphin and enkephalin production. This modulation of the immune system and inflammation pathways has shown therapeutic benefits in a range of chronic conditions.
medications.indication: Indicated for the management of autoimmune disorders, chronic pain syndromes, and inflammatory conditions. It is particularly beneficial for conditions such as multiple sclerosis, rheumatoid arthritis, Hashimoto’s thyroiditis, fibromyalgia, or irritable bowel syndrome. LDN helps reduce systemic inflammation, modulate immune responses, and improve symptom control, with potential neuroprotective and mood-enhancing effects.

medications.name: Oral BPC-KPV
medications.description: Oral BPC-KPV is a peptide-based therapy that combines BPC-157, known for its regenerative and anti-inflammatory properties, with KPV, a potent tripeptide derived from alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH) that helps modulate immune response and reduce inflammation. This combination is designed to support gut health, tissue repair, and immune regulation, making it a promising option for individuals with gastrointestinal disorders, inflammatory conditions, and musculoskeletal injuries.
medications.indication: Oral BPC-KPV is indicated for individuals seeking support for gut health, immune modulation, and tissue repair. It is commonly used for conditions such as inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD), leaky gut syndrome, gastritis, and other gastrointestinal disorders, as well as chronic inflammation and musculoskeletal injuries. By reducing inflammation, promoting cellular repair, and enhancing gut barrier integrity, BPC-KPV may aid in recovery from injury, optimize gut function, and support overall systemic healing.

medications.indication: Lowers bad cholesterol (LDL-C), raises good cholesterol (HDL-C), and supports heart and liver health while reducing inflammation.

medications.name: Metformin
medications.description: Metformin is a widely used oral medication primarily prescribed for managing type 2 diabetes. It works by improving insulin sensitivity, reducing glucose production in the liver, and enhancing glucose uptake by the body’s cells, effectively lowering blood sugar levels.
medications.indication: Metformin has been studied for its potential benefits in weight management, cardiovascular health, and even anti-aging applications. Its long-standing safety profile and effectiveness make it a cornerstone treatment for metabolic health under the guidance of a healthcare provider.

medications.name: Thymosin Alpha-1 (TA-1)
medications.description: Thymosin Alpha-1 (TA-1) is an immune-modulating peptide derived from the thymus that helps regulate and rebalance immune function rather than simply stimulating it. It enhances T-cell activity, improves immune surveillance, and modulates inflammatory signaling, making it particularly useful in states of immune dysregulation. In the gut, it supports the gut-associated immune system (GALT), helping reduce inappropriate immune reactions to microbes and food antigens while creating a more favorable environment for mucosal healing and microbiome balance.
medications.indication: TA-1 is best indicated in patients with chronic, immune-driven gut dysfunction—such as intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), dysbiosis, SIBO recurrence, or inflammatory bowel conditions—especially when there is a pattern of persistent inflammation alongside poor pathogen clearance. It is most useful in conjunction or when gut issues are not resolving with standard antimicrobial and repair protocols, suggesting underlying immune imbalance that requires modulation to restore resilience and prevent relapse.

medications.name: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN)
medications.description: Low Dose Naltrexone (LDN) is a compounded formulation of naltrexone, an opioid receptor antagonist, typically dosed between 0.5 mg and 4.5 mg. Unlike standard naltrexone dosing used for addiction treatment, LDN works by transiently blocking opioid receptors, leading to a rebound increase in endogenous endorphin and enkephalin production. This modulation of the immune system and inflammation pathways has shown therapeutic benefits in a range of chronic conditions.
medications.indication: Indicated for the management of autoimmune disorders, chronic pain syndromes, and inflammatory conditions. It is particularly beneficial for conditions such as multiple sclerosis, rheumatoid arthritis, Hashimoto’s thyroiditis, fibromyalgia, or irritable bowel syndrome. LDN helps reduce systemic inflammation, modulate immune responses, and improve symptom control, with potential neuroprotective and mood-enhancing effects.

supplements.name: Saw Palmetto
supplements.description: Saw Palmetto (Serenoa repens) is a botanical extract derived from the berries of a small palm tree traditionally used to support hormonal balance and prostate health.
supplements.indication: Saw palmetto is commonly used as a natural 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor, meaning it helps reduce the conversion of testosterone into dihydrotestosterone (DHT)—a more potent androgen associated with conditions like androgenic alopecia (hair loss), acne, and benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).

supplements.name: L-Glutamine
supplements.description: L-Glutamine is a conditionally essential amino acid that serves as a primary fuel source for enterocytes (intestinal lining cells) and plays a key role in maintaining gut integrity, immune function, and cellular repair. In functional medicine, it is commonly used to support the health of the gastrointestinal barrier and promote recovery from inflammation or stress-related depletion.
supplements.indication: L-glutamine is indicated to help repair and strengthen the gut lining, reduce intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), and support overall digestive and immune health. By improving nutrient absorption and lowering systemic inflammation, it can also indirectly support hormonal balance and optimize the body’s response to therapies aimed at addressing androgen-related concerns.

supplements.name: Iron
supplements.description: Iron is an essential trace mineral required for hemoglobin formation, oxygen transport, and cellular energy production. In functional medicine, iron status is evaluated not just by serum iron but in the context of ferritin, transferrin saturation, and overall inflammatory status, as iron plays a critical role in energy, cognitive function, and hair follicle cycling.
supplements.indication: Iron is indicated for the support of optimal oxygen delivery, energy production, and healthy red blood cell formation, particularly when labs suggest low iron availability contributing to fatigue, hair shedding, or poor recovery. Restoring adequate iron stores can also support thyroid function and hair growth, both of which are commonly impacted when iron status is suboptimal.

medications.name: Spironolactone
medications.description: Spironolactone is a potassium-sparing diuretic with anti-androgen properties that works by blocking androgen receptors and reducing the effects of hormones like testosterone and DHT at the tissue level. While originally developed for fluid balance and blood pressure support, it is widely used in functional and integrative care for its ability to modulate androgen activity systemically.
medications.indication: Indicated for individuals with signs of androgen excess or sensitivity, spironolactone is used to help reduce DHT-driven symptoms such as hormonal acne, androgenic hair loss, and unwanted hair growth. It is often considered when a stronger, systemic approach is needed to complement or go beyond natural DHT-modulating therapies.

supplements.name: Saw Palmetto
supplements.description: Saw Palmetto (Serenoa repens) is a botanical extract derived from the berries of a small palm tree traditionally used to support hormonal balance and prostate health.
supplements.indication: Saw palmetto is commonly used as a natural 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor, meaning it helps reduce the conversion of testosterone into dihydrotestosterone (DHT)—a more potent androgen associated with conditions like androgenic alopecia (hair loss), acne, and benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH).

supplements.name: L-Glutamine

In functional medicine, it is commonly used to support the health of the gastrointestinal barrier and promote recovery from inflammation or stress-related depletion.
supplements.indication: L-glutamine is indicated to help repair and strengthen the gut lining, reduce intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), and support overall digestive and immune health. By improving nutrient absorption and lowering systemic inflammation, it can also indirectly support hormonal balance and optimize the body’s response to therapies aimed at addressing androgen-related concerns.

supplements.name: Iron

Restoring adequate iron stores can also support thyroid function and hair growth, both of which are commonly impacted when iron status is suboptimal.

tests.name: Prolactin
tests.description: Prolactin is a hormone produced by the pituitary gland that primarily supports breast development and milk production, but from a functional medicine perspective, it also acts as a sensitive marker of the hypothalamic-pituitary axis and overall stress response. It is closely influenced by dopamine (which suppresses prolactin), meaning elevations can reflect reduced dopaminergic tone, chronic stress, poor sleep, or certain medications. Prolactin also interacts with sex hormones, and even mild elevations—within “normal” lab ranges—can contribute to subtle hormonal imbalances, including suppression of ovulation, progesterone, and testosterone.
tests.indication: Prolactin is evaluated to assess underlying drivers of hormone imbalance, particularly when patients present with symptoms like irregular cycles, low libido, infertility, or signs of low testosterone or progesterone. Functionally, a level above optimal (often considered >10 ng/mL, even if still “normal”) may prompt further investigation into stress physiology, dopamine balance, thyroid function, or potential pituitary involvement. Persistent elevations may warrant retesting.

medications.name: Thymosin Alpha-1
medications.description: Thymosin Alpha-1 (TA-1) is an immune-modulating peptide derived from the thymus that helps regulate and rebalance immune function rather than simply stimulating it. It enhances T-cell activity, improves immune surveillance, and modulates inflammatory signaling, making it particularly useful in states of immune dysregulation. In the gut, it supports the gut-associated immune system (GALT), helping reduce inappropriate immune reactions to microbes and food antigens while creating a more favorable environment for mucosal healing and microbiome balance.
medications.indication: TA-1 is best indicated in patients with chronic, immune-driven gut dysfunction—such as intestinal permeability (“leaky gut”), dysbiosis, SIBO recurrence, or inflammatory bowel conditions—especially when there is a pattern of persistent inflammation alongside poor pathogen clearance. It is most useful when gut issues are not resolving with standard antimicrobial and repair protocols, suggesting underlying immune imbalance that requires modulation to restore resilience and prevent relapse.

supplements.name: Green Tea
supplements.description: Green tea extract is a concentrated source of antioxidants, particularly catechins like EGCG, derived from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. These compounds help reduce oxidative stress, support metabolic health, and promote overall cellular function. In addition to its antioxidant benefits, green tea extract contains a natural combination of caffeine and L-theanine, which work synergistically to improve alertness and mental clarity without the typical jitters or crashes associated with stimulants.
supplements.indication: Recommended for individuals looking to support healthy weight management, improve focus and energy, and promote cardiovascular and metabolic health. Its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also make it beneficial for those seeking additional protection against the effects of chronic stress and aging.
